theory.name: UGMT_fundamental_form
theory.definition: UGMT as a candidate fundamental law for admissible generation, transport, persistence, symmetry reduction, and observer projection
theory.formal: UGMT_meta = (Gen, Adm, Comp, Persist, GaugeReduce, Proj_obs)

verdict.core_answer: The most abstract reading of UGMT is no longer just 'a math umbrella for intelligence'. It is becoming a candidate law for how admissible structures are generated, composed, persisted, symmetry-reduced, and observed within the universe.
